annotations.label: Induced Ramsey theorem

anchor.snippet: there exists a graph G such that any coloring of the edges of G using two colors contains a monochromatic induced copy of H

annotations.note: The induced Ramsey theorem is not formalized in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Induced Ramsey number

anchor.snippet: The smallest possible number of vertices of G is the induced Ramsey number

annotations.note: Induced Ramsey numbers are not defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Erdős conjecture on r_ind(H)

anchor.snippet: Paul Erdős conjectured that there exists a constant c such that every graph H on k vertices satisfies r ind ( H ) ≤ 2 ck

annotations.note: This conjecture on induced Ramsey numbers is not stated in Mathlib.
